title: Chip
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''chip''' was a device used for controlling [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] around [[44 ABY]]. [[Kitaya Shuul]] had one implanted just below her shoulder blade. A chip was able to transmit a signal about a slave's precise location and it could also be detonated.

==Appearances==
*''[[Fate of the Jedi: Allies]]'' {{Ab|Fate of the Jedi: Allies (audiobook)}} {{1st}}

[[Category:Restraining devices]]
[[Category:Slavery]]
